case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS BAUTISTA, MARICEL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $589.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT BAUTISTA, MARICEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-20-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BAUTISTA, MARICEL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-20-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-26-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAUTISTA, MARICEL $389.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $414.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
REQUEST TO CORRECT JUDGMENT FILED BY THE PLTF, CITY & COUNTY-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE.
COPIES OF REQUEST SENT TO THE PARTIES.
PLFT'S REQUEST TO CORRECT JUDGMENT: ORDER GRANTED BY JUDGE OLLIE MARIE-VICTOIRE. AMENDED JUDGMENT SENT TO PLFT AND DEFT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAUTISTA, MARICEL $589.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $614.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
